LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction01.label: Kin
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction01.description: A small but strong community of blood-related people. For them, tradition and the memory of ancestors are more important than power or wealth.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction02.label: Ancient Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction02.description: A community united by a common totem and legends. They live as one, following their leader and the spirits.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction03.label: Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction03.description: A stable structure with a clear hierarchy. Everyone knows their place, and the honor of the clan is above all else.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction04.label: Commune
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction04.description: A group where equality and mutual aid rule. Decisions are made collectively, as in a family.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction05.label: Gatherers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction05.description: Nomads living on the gifts of nature. They believe that the world feeds those who are not greedy.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction06.label: Hunters
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction06.description: Skilled trackers and fighters who honor the law of the prey. Their life is an eternal pursuit and waiting.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction07.label: Keepers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction07.description: Guardians of ancient knowledge, sacred places, and relics. They consider themselves the link between the past and the future.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction08.label: Ancestors
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction08.description: Spirits or legendary founders of nations. Their names are spoken in rituals, asking for wisdom and protection.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction09.label: Herd
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction09.description: A primitive union led by instincts. The strength of each lies in merging with the mass, with the rhythm of nature.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction10.label: Wanderers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction10.description: Eternal travelers who turned away from home for the sake of horizons. They carry the memory of foreign lands with them.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction11.label: Tribesmen
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction11.description: Those bound not by blood, but by choice. They are united by a sense of a shared path and brotherhood.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction12.label: Children of the Mist
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction12.description: Mysterious nomads appearing from nowhere and disappearing into the haze. It is said they see what is hidden from others.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction13.label: Stone People
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction13.description: Strong, hardy highlanders. Their life is slow but unbreakable, like the rocks among which they live.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction14.label: Battle Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction14.description: A warrior brotherhood born of war. Their cult is honor, strength, and the memory of the fallen.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction15.label: Wind Wanderers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction15.description: Light-spirited travelers who value freedom above all laws. Their steps leave no tracks.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction16.label: Ancient Commune
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction16.description: A group that has survived centuries, whose roots are lost in time. They preserve forgotten rituals.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction17.label: Tree Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction17.description: A people living in unity with the forest. Their life is a cycle of growth, death, and rebirth.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction18.label: Death Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction18.description: Somber servants of the transition between worlds. They do not fear the end, considering it part of the path.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction19.label: Fate Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction19.description: Prophets and seers following the path written by the stars. They believe that every living being has a destiny.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction20.label: Spirit Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction20.description: Beings living on the border of worlds. Their voice is the whisper of the wind, and their presence is felt when the darkness thickens.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction21.label: Children of the Sun
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction21.description: A tribe that deifies the daylight. They believe every action is seen by the sky and strive to live in light and truth.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction22.label: Shadow Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction22.description: Mysterious inhabitants of caves and thickets. They are masters of camouflage and silent movement, considering darkness their best friend.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction23.label: Free Nomads
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction23.description: A group with no permanent home. They follow herds of animals and the signs of the stars, recognizing no borders or foreign laws.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction24.label: Bear Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction24.description: Mighty warriors whose totem is the master of the forest. They are distinguished by great strength, endurance, and rage in battle.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction25.label: River People
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction25.description: Masters of boat building and fishing. Their entire life is connected to the water, which they revere as a nursing mother.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction26.label: Fire Keepers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction26.description: A tribe that considers fire a sacred gift from the gods. They never let their main campfire go out, believing that life will leave the kin with it.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction27.label: Wolf Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction27.description: A pack of hunters acting in coordination and without mercy. Their tactics are based on exhausting the enemy and striking a sudden blow at a weak point.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction28.label: Sages of the Mountains
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction28.description: An isolated community living on cloud-piercing peaks. They spend their time in meditation and studying ancient petroglyphs.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction29.label: Bone Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction29.description: Grim warriors who decorate themselves with the skulls of enemies. They believe that the strength of a killed opponent passes to the one who wears their remains.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction30.label: Children of Thunder
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction30.description: A militant tribe that considers thunder to be the voice of the gods. In every peal, they hear a call to battle and new achievements.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction31.label: Wasteland Nomads
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction31.description: Those who have learned to survive where others perish. They are content with little and know the value of every drop of water and handful of grain.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction32.label: Root Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction32.description: A group practicing a deep connection with the earth's depths. They know the secret properties of plants and can find their way in the most tangled forests.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction33.label: Falcon People
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction33.description: A proud tribe with a keen gaze. Their scouts see the enemy from miles away, and their archers strike without miss.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction34.label: Turtle Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction34.description: A peace-loving tribe that prefers strong defense over attack. They build reliable fortifications and value family comfort above all else.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction35.label: Milky Way Wanderers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction35.description: A mystical tribe whose legends tell of ancestors coming from the stars. They keep strange artifacts whose purpose is forgotten.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction36.label: Wind Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction36.description: Fast and agile people living on the open plains. They believe the wind brings news from distant relatives and spirits.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction37.label: Dream Keepers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction37.description: A tribe of shamans who attach great importance to visions. Every important decision is made only after interpreting nocturnal dreams.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction38.label: Snake Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction38.description: Secretive and wise people who know much about poisons and healing. They prefer cunning over brute force and always have an escape plan.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction39.label: Whispering Grass People
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction39.description: Herbalists and gatherers living in harmony with the meadow. They hear the music of nature where others see only thickets.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction40.label: Fierce Face Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction40.description: A group that uses terrifying masks and paint. For them, war is primarily psychological pressure on the opponent.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction41.label: Northern Hunters
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction41.description: Cold-hardened people living on the edge of glaciers. Their life is a constant struggle with the elements for meager prey.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction42.label: Red Sand Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction42.description: Inhabitants of hot deserts, able to find water under the scorching sun. Their skin is dry as parchment, and their will is hard as flint.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction43.label: Mist Nomads
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction43.description: A mysterious group whose camps are always shrouded in haze. It is said they know how to call the mist to hide from pursuers.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction44.label: Lynx Clan
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction44.description: Solitary hunters who gather only to protect against a large threat. They value independence and personal skill.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction45.label: Great Lake People
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction45.description: A settled tribe that has created a prosperous economy on fertile shores. They are hospitable to friends but harsh to uninvited guests.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction46.label: Grotto Keepers
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction46.description: A tribe living in a system of natural caves. They have turned their dwellings into true underground fortresses.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction47.label: Children of the Moon
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction47.description: Nocturnal inhabitants leading an active life under the silvery glow. They believe the moon gives them special wisdom and tranquility.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction48.label: Clear Stream Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction48.description: A peace-loving community living in a picturesque valley. Their ideals are purity of thought and harmony with the surrounding world.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction49.label: Thunder Nomads
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction49.description: Riders whose approach is heard long before they appear. They carry with them the energy of the storm and the unstoppable power of nature.
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction50.label: First Campfire Tribe
LanguageData.MF_NeolithicFaction50.description: The oldest kin, claiming the right to be called the progenitors of all tribes. They preserve legends of the world's creation.
